name: Potato Ala Picante
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Onion, cut in half lengthwise, then cut crosswise into thin slices
1 cup Shredded cheddar cheese, as desired
recipeInstructions: These impressive and easy-to-prepare "pleated" potatoes are an ideal accompaniment to all manner of meats, fish and poultry. Cut potatoes crosswise into 1/8-inch to 1/4-inch slices, being careful not to cut all the way through so the potato remains intact. Place cut side up in a shallow baking dish. Slip onion slices in between cuts in potato, rounded side up. Brush or spoon butter evenly over potatoes; sprinkle lightly with salt. Bake in preheated oven at 425°F for 1 hour and 15 minutes or until fork tender. Remove from oven; spoon Pace Picante Sauce evenly over each potato. Continue baking 10 minutes. Sprinkle with cheese; return to oven just until cheese is melted. Serve with additional Pace Picante Sauce.
